headline: State Street (STT) Stock After 65% Year Gain Are Recent Valuation Signals Justified
summary: If you are wondering whether State Street stock still offers value after its recent run, this article breaks down what the current price might be implying and how that lines up with several valuation checks. State Street most recently closed at US$169.51, with returns of 0.7% over the past 7 days, 6.9% over 30 days, 31.3% year to date and 65.4% over 1 year, plus multi year returns of 155.8% over 3 years and 135.7% over 5 years. Recent coverage around State Street has focused on its role as a...

headline: QQQ Isn’t the Only Game in Town. Competition Heats Up for Nasdaq-100 ETFs.
summary: State Street is challenging Invesco with its newly launched Nasdaq-100 exchange-traded fund. BlackRock is poised to join the fray.

headline: State Street vs. Vanguard: Which Energy ETF Stands Out in 2026?
summary: A highly concentrated, narrow portfolio may be attractive to some investors, while others may prefer a broader strategy.
